message:
fix(cass): truncate redacted output on UTF-8 boundary to respect byte budgets

The max_len parameter in redact_and_truncate is byte-oriented (for CLI
output budgets), but the previous implementation used chars().take()
which counts Unicode scalar values, not bytes. Switch to byte-index
truncation with is_char_boundary walk-back to produce valid UTF-8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
